description: Canonical pathfinding routes for the Phase 5 OG to UC zeppelin scenario. Used by tools/scripts/probe-routes.ps1 and the iterate-pathfinding orchestrator.

routes.name: ClimbOrgrimmarTowerToFrezza
routes.description: Phase 5.3.6 climb: OG flight master tower top to Frezza zeppelin master. The deck-lip step-up at corner [001]->[002] (1.75y vertical over 1.7y horizontal) is the open Phase 6 mesh-fidelity blocker.
routes.expectedStallReason: deck-lip 1.75y step-up exceeds Tauren capsule runtime step-up tolerance

routes.name: FlightMasterDescentControl
routes.description: Walk leg used by the orgrimmar_flight_master_tower_descent test. Known-good walkable from flight-master tower top to OG city ground. Use as a control to verify a regen did not regress healthy routes.

routes.name: OgApproachToBoardingPosition
routes.description: PROOF C short-hop. Same-tile traversal from ApproachPosition to BoardingPosition (the final 18 yards of the climb). Detour returns 11 polys but bot physics fails; phase 5.3.4 fix landed but the underlying step-up still applies.

routes.name: OgFrezzaToBoardingPosition
routes.description: Short-hop control between the two Phase 5.3.5 anchors at the same Z tier. Should be a clean 5-poly Detour traversal with no step-ups.

routes.name: DeckLipStallToFrezza
routes.description: Phase 5.3.6 Cycle 5 corner diagnostic. Stall coord (1338,-4646,51.6) to Frezza spawn (1331,-4649,53.6) -- 4 corners, the [001]->[002] segment is the failure point.
